scripts.build: if [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ]; then python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv pip install --system -r backend/requirements.txt; else python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; fi && python backend/manage.py collectstatic --noinput && npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build
